description: Legal document concerning a husband who wanted to travel to see his mother and relatives and his wife took him to court for it. He reportedly said that he would “go and come back,” to which his wife replied, “I did not believe his words” (lo heʾemanti li-devarav). Signed by Yiṣḥaq b. Saʿadya ha-Kohen. (Information mainly from Oded Zinger, Women, Gender, and Law, 83.) EMS
description_he: מסמך משפטי: בעל שרצה לנסוע לבקר אמו ומשפחתו, ואשתו תבעה אותו לדין. חתום בידי יצחק בן סעדיה הכהן.
